title: I quit UK police to become UFO hunter – Trump must blow lid off alien secrets with ‘out of this world’ revelations
description: A FORMER UK cop who now cracks UFO cases hopes Donald Trump will blow the lid off top alien secrets. Gary Heseltine, 65, who took early retirement in 2013 to become a full-time UFO detective, is hoping the real X-files will reveal "out of this world" revelations - but is remaining slightly cautious. title: Trump promised UFO files. Why the documents still aren’t public
